name: DataRetentionEnforcer

ironRules.rule: Dual gate — BOTH retentionExpiresAt < now AND legalHoldActive === false required before any deleteDocument. legalHold supersedes expiry. CF-19-4.
On legalHoldActive = true, emit RetentionHoldActive and skip record entirely — no purge under legal hold. CF-19-4.

archive-before-delete: storeDocument(xiigen-retention-archive, archivedRecord, archiveRef) MUST complete before deleteDocument/tombstone write. Data permanently lost if delete-before-archive on crash. CF-19-4.
PurgeCompleted includes archiveRef for audit trail. CF-19-4.
CRON schedule MUST come from FREEDOM config key flow19_retention_cron_schedule — no hardcoded cron expressions. CF-19-4.

keywords: DataRetentionEnforcer dual gate retentionExpiresAt legalHold archive before delete CRON FREEDOM config PurgeCompleted archiveRef T624 CF-19-4
